required_preferences.fact: No longer preps coffee or workout clothes before bed; instead, follows a doctor-designed pre-sleep routine involving dimming lights, listening to calming music, and limiting physical activity to gentle stretching

supersedes.fact: Preps her coffee and lays out workout clothes each night before bed—never leaves mornings to chance

required_preferences.fact: Coordinates her grandmother’s meals, errands, and medical appointments remotely with retirement community staff, only performing hands-on errands when absolutely necessary

supersedes.fact: Prepares meals and manages her grandmother’s errands every Saturday, coordinating medical appointments and shopping herself

required_preferences.fact: Assigns follow-up tasks to herself and team immediately after every demo—never leaves action items untracked
Reviews her sales pipeline every Friday afternoon—never lets a week pass without updating her projections
Drives to work and listens to podcasts related to sales leadership during her commute—never commutes by public transit
Uses a sleep journal nightly to log bedtime, sleep quality, and routine adherence as required by her physician

persona: A 28-year-old account executive at a fast-growing SaaS startup
